iran_nuke.notes: Day 16 12:00 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Iran continues missile waves at Israel despite US claiming 'functional defeat' of missile production. Mojtaba Khamenei confirmed alive by Iranian FM. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 16 12:00 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). NEW: IRGC vows to 'pursue and kill' Netanyahu (Indian Express). Iran threatens US bank branches as legitimate targets if oil infrastructure struck again (Sky News). Multiple new missile waves at Israel overnight — 5th reported since midnight alone (Times Now). Jordan intercepted 79/85 Iranian missiles. Gulf states report new attacks. Saudi intercepts 10 drones over Riyadh. 100 (capped, rising).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 16 12:00 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). NEW: Israel FM Saar rejects direct talks with Lebanon — contradicts Haaretz/Kushner track (Sky News). 15 Israeli helicopters land in eastern Lebanon near Nabi Sheet via Syrian border — major ground expansion (Wikipedia/TOI). ~10 rockets hit Haifa area (Times Now). 800 killed, 800,000 displaced in Lebanon (Sky News/Guardian). French peace plan proposes Lebanese recognition of Israel (Axios). Diplomatic off-ramp explicitly removed. 100 (capped, rising).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new Turkey developments since 3rd missile intercept. Erdogan vows Turkey 'will not be dragged into Iran war.' NATO Patriot at Kurecik. 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 78.

india.notes: ELEVATED RISING. NEW: India condemns Pakistan airstrikes in Afghanistan as 'another act of aggression' (India Today). India watching Pak-Afghan escalation closely. 25 (rising).

russia.notes: Day 16 12:00 — IMMINENT STABLE. No new Russia-specific developments. US sanctions waiver for Russian oil drawing European rebuke (Guardian). 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. No new China/Taiwan developments. China urges Pakistan-Afghanistan resolve via talks (Reuters). 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: Day 16 12:00 — CRITICAL RISING. No new developments since 10-missile salvo on Mar 14. Kim Yo Jong condemns Freedom Shield exercises. Cruise missiles tested from destroyer Choe Hyon. Trend remains rising. 47 (rising).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 16 12:00 — IMMINENT RISING. NEW: 6 killed, 15 wounded in Russian missile/drone strike on Kyiv region (Reuters/Guardian/NBC). Energy infrastructure, residential buildings, schools, businesses hit. 460 aerial targets launched, 58 intercepted (Ukrinform). Russia strikes Ukrzaliznytsia (railway) infrastructure. Trump slams Zelensky as 'far more difficult' than Putin (Independent). US postponed Russia-Ukraine talks due to Iran war. 81 (rising).

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 16 12:00 — IMMINENT RISING (capped). NEW: Pakistan fires 200+ rockets/artillery shells into Kunar province in 48 hours (Organiser). Major strikes on Kandahar military facilities and 'terrorist hideouts' — operation 'Ghazb lil Haq' expanded (Economic Times/Hindu). Pakistan says it struck drone storage and military installations. Taliban acknowledges civilian facility damage. India condemns Pakistan (India Today). China urges talks (Reuters). 99 (capped, rising).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
NO DE-ESCALATION ON ANY FRONT. ESCALATION ACCELERATING:
- Iran: 5th+ missile wave since midnight alone. IRGC vows to kill Netanyahu. Threatens US banks.
- Israel-Lebanon: Israel explicitly rejects diplomatic talks. Expands ground ops to eastern Lebanon via Syria. 800 dead, 800K displaced. Hezbollah rockets Haifa.
- Pakistan-Afghanistan: 200+ rockets in 48 hours. Operation Ghazb lil Haq expanding. India condemns Pakistan.
- Russia-Ukraine: Russia exploits ME chaos — new Kyiv strike kills 6. US peace talks postponed indefinitely.
- DPRK: 10-missile salvo still echoing. No de-escalation signals.
- Turkey: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted. NATO Article 5 threshold getting closer.

ZERO diplomatic off-ramps operational. Eight trackers at imminent/critical. Global war probability 75% CRITICAL.

latest_news.headline: Iran launches 5th+ ballistic missile wave at Israel since midnight — sirens across country
latest_news.text: Iran fires multiple ballistic missile waves at Israel in overnight and morning attacks. 5th wave reported since midnight alone. Jordan intercepts 79 of 85 Iranian missiles/drones. Saudi Arabia intercepts 10 drones over Riyadh. Bahrain sirens sound. UAE reports missile attack.

latest_news.headline: IRGC vows to 'pursue and kill' Netanyahu — explicit assassination threat
latest_news.text: Iran's Revolutionary Guards vow to 'pursue and kill' Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu. Major escalation in personal targeting of Israeli leadership. Iran also threatens US bank branches in region as legitimate targets.

latest_news.headline: Israel rejects direct talks with Lebanon — FM Saar says 'no plans'
latest_news.text: Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Saar explicitly rejects direct talks with Lebanon, contradicting earlier reports of Kushner-brokered negotiations. Macron offered to host peace talks in Paris. 800 killed, 800,000 displaced in Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: 15 Israeli helicopters land in eastern Lebanon near Nabi Sheet via Syrian border
latest_news.text: Hezbollah reports fighting Israeli forces that landed in eastern Lebanon near Nabi Sheet — 15 helicopters arrived from the Syrian side of the border. Major expansion of ground operations beyond southern Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan fires 200+ rockets into Afghanistan in 48 hours — Kandahar military facilities struck
latest_news.text: Pakistan fires over 200 rockets and artillery shells into Kunar province, Afghanistan in 48 hours. Operation 'Ghazb lil Haq' targets military installations and 'terrorist hideouts' in Kandahar. Taliban acknowledges civilian facility damage. India condemns Pakistan.

latest_news.headline: 6 killed in Russian missile/drone strike on Kyiv region — peace talks stalled
latest_news.text: Russian missile and drone attack kills 6, wounds 15 in Kyiv region. Energy infrastructure, residential buildings, schools hit. 460 aerial targets launched, 58 intercepted. Russia targets Ukrzaliznytsia railway infrastructure. US postponed Russia-Ukraine talks due to Iran war.

latest_news.headline: Iran threatens US bank branches as 'legitimate targets' if oil strikes continue
latest_news.text: Iranian military says further strikes on Iranian oil/energy would make US bank branches in the region legitimate targets. IRGC Brigadier Gen. Naeini warns all US-linked economic infrastructure will be 'destroyed and turned to ashes.'

latest_news.headline: Mojtaba Khamenei alive and well — Iran FM contradicts Trump's death speculation
latest_news.text: Iranian FM Araghchi confirms Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei 'in good health and fully managing the situation.' Former MI6 chief says Khamenei injured but recovering. Following 40-day mourning period — may not appear publicly until April 9.

outlook:
CRITICAL — Global war probability 75% (Day 16 12:00). MULTI-FRONT ESCALATION INTENSIFYING:

(1) IRAN → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): 5th+ missile wave since midnight. IRGC vows to kill Netanyahu. Threatens US bank branches. Jordan intercepts 79/85 missiles. Gulf states under continued attack. Supreme Leader alive but unseen.

(2) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): Israel REJECTS diplomatic talks — removes last off-ramp. 15 helicopters land in eastern Lebanon via Syrian border — massive ground expansion. ~10 rockets hit Haifa. 800 dead, 800K displaced. French peace plan proposes Lebanese recognition of Israel.

(3) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 99 (capped, RISING): 200+ rockets in 48 hours. Kandahar military facilities struck. Operation Ghazb lil Haq expanding. India condemns Pakistan. China mediation ineffective.

(4) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 86 (RISING): 6 killed in Kyiv strikes. Russia exploits ME war — targets energy/railway. US peace talks postponed indefinitely. Trump blames Zelensky.

(5) RUSSIA → IMMINENT 77 (stable).

(6) TURKEY → IMMINENT 78: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted. NATO Article 5 threshold dangerously close.

(7) DPRK → CRITICAL 47 (RISING): 10-missile salvo echo. No de-escalation.

(8) INDIA → ELEVATED 25 (RISING): Condemns Pakistan. Watching Pak-Afghan.

EIGHT TRACKERS AT IMMINENT/CRITICAL/ZERO DIPLOMATIC OFF-RAMPS. Coalition cohesion degrading (Kuwait friendly fire, European sanctions rebuke, UK 'no ships to send'). Oil infrastructure under multi-axis attack.
